model.outputContract: simulatte.intentBrief.v1 fields: entities, materials, phenomena, forces, fields, causal candidates, assumptions, unsupported
model.guardrail: The model may select, connect, or question retrieved catalog IDs. It may not invent executable physics primitives.

retrievalDependency.role: semantic evidence retrieval for prompt, catalog entries, primitives, materials, visual cards, examples, and causal patterns

rerank.policy: use embedding score, lexical hit, prompt citation, primitive support, and causal operator availability
